groupNotificationsHint: Receive occasional notifications about the latest offers, wants, new members and other community news.
pendingAccountText: Your account is pending approval. You can't record trades or see other users' offers and wants until your account is activated by the community administrators.
groupEmailsHint: Receive a compilation of latest offers, wants and statistics from your community.
deleteAccountText: Completely delete your account and delete all your data in this platform inlcuding your profile, offers, wants and your account. You need to have a positive or zero balance to delete your account, contact your administrator otherwise.
needFormHelpText: Fill the details of your new want
Fill the details of your new want.
uploadNeedImagesHint: Adding a picture to a want makes it more attractive
needDescriptionHint: Provide here all the details for other members to understand your want
needCategoryHint: Select the category that best describes your want
needExpirationDateHint: The date when your want will expire
needDescriptionRequired: Explain your want with some detail
needPublishedHint: Make this want visible to other members
deleteNeed: Do you want to delete the want {name}?
transactionPayerHint: Select the user who received the service.
pleaseReviewTransfer: Please accept or reject this trade.
receivePaymentText: Select who received what you provided, describe what you provided, and enter the value.
sendPaymentText: Select who provided what you received, describe what you received, and enter the value.
enterMultipleTransactionsText: Fill the following fields to record multiple trades sequentially. You can also load them from a CSV file.
copyDescription: Use the same description for all records
enableNotificationsText: Enable notifications to be aware of trade activity related to you and important news in your community. You can configure or disable them later.
transactionPayeeHint: Select the user who provided the service.
editCurrencyText: Define the main attributes of your community's units
transactionCommitted: The trade has been successfully recorded
transactionPending: The trade is pending approval from the other user
transactionRejected: The trade has been rejected and will not be recorded
acceptPaymentsHint: If enabled, trades requested by other users will be automatically accepted. Otherwise, you will have to accept them manually.
myAccountNotificationsHint: Receive notifications about activity in your account: recorded trades, pending trades, expired offers and wants...
disabledAccountText: Your account is disabled. Go to your settings to re-enable it before you can record trades.
myAccountEmailsHint: Emails related to your account: trades, expired offers and wants...
createTransactionText: Fill the following fields to record a trade between two users.
chooseAccountNoListingText: Type the account code in the external community '{group}'. You can also use the code scanner feature to read the trade.
importFileText: Select a CSV (Comma Separated Values) file with the trades to import. The file must have exactly 4 columns in order: From, To, Description, Amount. The column Amount must be a number without any symbol and must be expressed in your currency unit. The app will discard the first row if it contains headers. You can create the file with a spreadsheet program.
transactionsRejected: {num} trades have been rejected and won't be recorded
enterTransactionDataQR: Set a description and an amount to build the trade QR code.
scanThisQR: Scan this QR code with the app to record the trade
enterTransactionDataNfc: Set a trade description and an amount before scanning the NFC tag.
acceptExternalPaymentsAutomaticallyHint: Automatically accept all external trade requests.
dailyVolumeText: Sum of all trades in the last 24 hours
monthlyVolumeText: Sum of all trades in the last 30 days
yearlyVolumeText: Sum of all trades in the last 365 days
allTimeVolumeText: Sum of all trades since the community was created
volumeChartText: Sum of all trades over the selected period
activeAccountsChartText: Users with at least one trade over the selected period
monthlyActiveAccountsText: Users with at least one trade in the last month
yearlyActiveAccountsText: Users with at least one trade in the last year
monthlyTransactionsText: Number of trades in the last month
yearlyTransactionsText: Number of trades in the last year
disableAccountConfirmText: Are you sure you want to disable your account? Your account and all your data will be hidden and you won't be able to record trades until you re-enable it.
enableAccountConfirmText: Your account and your data will be visible again and you will be able to record trades.
ErrorNoTrustPath: Trade failed because there is no exchange path between the two currencies
